p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Nat) { x0 * x1.pow(x2) = monomial_real_fn(x0, x2, x1) }(c, x, n)
function(x0: Real, x1: Nat) { x0.pow(x1) = pow_real_fn(x1, x0) }(x, n)

goal: const_mul_left(c, pow_real_fn(n), x) = c * pow_real_fn(n, x)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1(x2) = const_mul_left(x0, x1, x2) }(c, pow_real_fn(n), x)

goal: monomial_real_fn(c, n, x) = const_mul_left(c, pow_real_fn(n), x)
